calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2009 Continued To Feb-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sequoia Concepts, Inc., a California corporation dba Sequoia Financial Services.
Officer Alan Lamb, Francis Mata and Yvette Mannion, all witnesses for plaintiff, were placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Angela Healy or Alexander H. Cao.
Defaults were entered against defendants on October 21, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 21, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, January 13, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Sequioa Concepts, Inc. a California corporation dba Sequoia Financial Services, and against the Defaulted Defendants Angela Healy and Alexander H. Cao as follows:

As to Defendant Angela Healy:

Damages/Principal - $125,797.85.
Prejudgment Interest - $17,956.34.
Costs - $704.69, for a total judgment in the amount of $144,484.88. Defendant Angela Healy is jointly and severally liable for this amount.

As to Defendant Alexander H. Cao:

Damages/Principal - 35,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,995.88.
Costs - $704.69, for a total judgment in the amount of $40,700.57. Defendant Alexander H. Cao is solely liable for this amount.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
